testcase.name: testDestroySessionCascadeDeletesMasterAndWorkers
testcase.system-out: 19:05:05.270 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.session.impl.SessionManagerImpl -- SessionManagerImpl initialized 19:05:05.271 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.session.impl.SessionManagerImpl -- Creating new Master session for FEISHU:group-123 with topic: Test task topic 19:05:05.271 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.session.impl.SessionManagerImpl -- Binding created: FEISHU:group-123 -> master-session-456 19:05:05.271 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.session.impl.SessionManagerImpl -- Starting cascade deletion for imGroupId: group-123 19:05:05.273 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.session.impl.SessionManagerImpl -- Processing cascade deletion for binding FEISHU:group-123 -> master-session-456 19:05:05.273 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.session.impl.SessionManagerImpl -- Found 2 worker sessions under master master-session-456 19:05:05.273 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.session.impl.SessionManagerImpl -- Deleting worker session: worker-session-1 19:05:05.277 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.session.impl.SessionManagerImpl -- Deleting worker session: worker-session-2 19:05:05.277 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.session.impl.SessionManagerImpl -- Deleting master session messages: master-session-456 19:05:05.277 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.session.impl.SessionManagerImpl -- Deleting master session record: master-session-456 19:05:05.277 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.session.impl.SessionManagerImpl -- Cascade deletion completed for master session master-session-456 19:05:05.277 [main] INFO tech.yesboss.session.impl.SessionManagerImpl -- Cascade deletion completed for imGroupId: group-123

testcase.name: testDestroySessionCascadeWithNoWorkers
